textByHashes.6ef00a9b66f4fe82a3c097a45e878eb22841c8c9: Oh Remy is still alive! We thought Jack fed him to the Icelord.
textByHashes.0035adf6483a83f4167fb9fe9f8fa129954920bb: I thought you had it, Mary.
textByHashes.de3419949249267cb7895fbff87b0278a8554c62: Don't you think I'd have opened the door if I had it?
textByHashes.6be05af6c3fd921ed75b1ed3d58ad6e070229d76: Great, now I'm locked in here with you for the rest of my life.
textByHashes.eb52bd654d8fbfd1fcab999d7111cb8ae41d6ece: Ooooh that sounds like it hurt!
textByHashes.4f4c8ca6a5d72d1ce3dc97c48b66cb38481d6eca: That's great, come on let us out then.
textByHashes.c63541493ee65d1d76119dc3cf88144f83b62998: You've looked around the bakery and no luck?
textByHashes.19ae6cf568a27189e0fba3da7e4f5623859a5b57: It wouldn't be safe to go in there.
textByHashes.47ee5db8bb7a6bfcf7dd79ff7e6919aa672665b8: Hmm... You're going to need a way to protect yourself from the Icelord.
textByHashes.0620c6b9e8fc2c474b751bba66f2491d8ee2c94c: But I do have a genius idea, we'll use Gingerbread!
textByHashes.91392e8ae844ca9762cafdb5dfd45f99eccde765: Before Jack locked us up, I saw him using the Icelord to ice his Gingerbread Gnomes. They did a great job of absorbing his breath.
textByHashes.66a46af798c97c66e1d6961cabd202948b108959: You'll need to make a Gingerbread Gnome big enough to absorb the Icelord's breath.
textByHashes.2c1bb863b671c52f38b3915f50c6b8cbccfbd8d5: Our usual recipe uses: one cinnamon, one ginger, one flour and one egg, we put them into that big machine you see to your left.
textByHashes.12633fecfe994a88e273d4791ecce3475df5a229: Try using more of each ingredient till you get the right combination? Possibly tripling the amount of each ingredient might work.
textByHashes.4d94e04f2a33b3793cd1f0d0679c60b055ea2498: Come back to us if you need some more help.
textByHashes.97856b1e242b070ba6141e71dec834c253c8b68b: That's great! Now hurry up and open the door.
textByHashes.14a4832a802136bf6cef1bd129165a7475be78aa: Wow, you managed to do that so quickly! Without any help from us.
textByHashes.991be80d308566302d22b9b21db7445c10d77f93: ...Me too, I thought you'd be turned into icing for sure.
textByHashes.88eea528519021184b57c8b9508d2ba0588890b3: It worked out didn't it? We're free to continue making Gingerbread Gnomes.
textByHashes.3ce49e261aa55be320b496acaeee4e4792c5b795: What do we do about the Icelord in the cage?
textByHashes.9d92259615793195f8311d20aed5f66f3a9f8984: Alright, time for you to go, we need to get back into production.
textByHashes.a4c909108653c82d7f64cc61164fb19e076d8f10: You'll need ginger, cinnamon, flour and eggs. We usually only use one of each, maybe tripling the amount of each will work.
textByHashes.0fc8103c500a5b41023d66447c3513b95999c662: Fantastic! Now you need to enter the Icelord's cage.
textByHashes.039438015fe08078be8636c4f31aa4a9028d141f: Don't worry, I'm sure this idea will work, just make sure to equip it before you go in.
textByHashes.90952249dfaff97301dbddefa4da7c13a5ac7dee: Go away, we're busy trying to catch up.
textByHashes.13eac710404b3414592b8a92bed4ebd590c4dfb4: Oh, thanks for telling us, we'll go back to using normal icing.
